notes: Open mSupply exposes a single GraphQL endpoint (POST {baseUrl}/graphql, body {query, variables}, response {data, errors}). No published OpenAPI exists; this spec is derived (converted) from the GraphQL query/mutation strings embedded in the adaptor dist bundle (queries.js) plus the ast.json operation surface. Coverage: the 4 public adaptor operations (getItemsWithStats -> itemsWithStats query; insertOutboundShipment -> insertOutboundShipment mutation; upsertOutboundShipment -> batchOutboundShipment mutation; query -> generic GraphQL), plus the internal authToken login mutation the adaptor runs before requests. CAVEAT: OpenAPI 3.0 allows only one operation per method per path, so each GraphQL operation is modelled as a distinct path variant under /graphql (e.g. /graphql#itemsWithStats) solely to carry a unique operationId and response schema; at runtime all of them are a POST to the same /graphql endpoint. Response component schemas (ItemNode, ItemStats, ItemConnector, InvoiceNode, BatchOutboundShipmentResult, etc.) were reconstructed from the selection sets in the adaptor's GraphQL documents, not from the full Open mSupply SDL, so they are a faithful subset of the fields the adaptor actually requests. Server base URL is a placeholder (demo-open.msupply.org); real deployments are self-hosted and set via the adaptor baseUrl credential.
